title: christella distans
intro: Christella distans, also known as the distant lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Christella distans include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Christella distans can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
